_doc: Magic 2015 (M15) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/m15.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 53R / 15M. Collation: US sequential, C1/C2 common collation. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Core set. 15-card booster packs plus an additional ad card (36/box). Foil 1:67 cards. Printed in USA and Belgium. Uncommons split into four runs (A/B/C/D). The ad/marketing card carries tokens/tips/emblems on its front face (not a collectible token slot).

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
